---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for mcp-conductor
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear description of what problem this would solve. For example: "I'm always frustrated when..." or "There's no way to currently..."

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Be as specific as you can — include expected inputs, outputs, and any relevant behavior details.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

Have you found any workarounds or alternative approaches? What are their trade-offs compared to your proposed solution?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here. Links to similar features in other tools are very welcome.

---

> **Note:** For general questions or discussion about potential features before opening a formal request, feel free to start a conversation in [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/darkiceinteractive/mcp-conductor/discussions) first. We appreciate feedback of all kinds!
